official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the singleton empty-body Play clientbound start_configuration fixture.

field_notes.body: Singleton unit fixture; proves packet body only, not the runtime Play-to-Configuration transition.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound start_configuration packet framing and dispatch/decode for the singleton empty-body fixture only; do not infer state-transition handling or client-load completion.
